Models

User

Description: Represents an HR Administrator or Recruiter using the TalentMatch AI platform.

Fields

Name Type Attributes Required Comment
id Int
  • @id
  • @default(autoincrement())
 Yes -
email String
  • @unique
 Yes -
password String
  • -
Yes -
role UserRole
  • @default(USER)
 Yes -
createdAt DateTime
  • @default(now())
 Yes -
updatedAt DateTime
  • @updatedAt
 Yes -
departments Department[]
  • -
Yes -
positions Position[]
  • -
Yes -
vacancies Vacancy[]
  • -
Yes -
candidates Candidate[]
  • -
Yes -

Operations

findUnique

Find zero or one User

// Get one User
const user = await prisma.user.findUnique({
  where: {
    // ... provide filter here
  }
})

Input

Name Type Required
where UserWhereUniqueInput Yes

Output

Type: User
Required: No
List: No

findFirst

Find first User

// Get one User
const user = await prisma.user.findFirst({
  where: {
    // ... provide filter here
  }
})

Input

Name Type Required
where UserWhereInput No
orderBy UserOrderByWithRelationInput[] | UserOrderByWithRelationInput No
cursor UserWhereUniqueInput No
take Int No
skip Int No
distinct UserScalarFieldEnum | UserScalarFieldEnum[] No

Output

Type: User
Required: No
List: No

findMany

Find zero or more User

// Get all User
const User = await prisma.user.findMany()
// Get first 10 User
const User = await prisma.user.findMany({ take: 10 })

Input

Name Type Required
where UserWhereInput No
orderBy UserOrderByWithRelationInput[] | UserOrderByWithRelationInput No
cursor UserWhereUniqueInput No
take Int No
skip Int No
distinct UserScalarFieldEnum | UserScalarFieldEnum[] No

Output

Type: User
Required: Yes
List: Yes

create

Create one User

// Create one User
const User = await prisma.user.create({
  data: {
    // ... data to create a User
  }
})

Input

Name Type Required
data UserCreateInput | UserUncheckedCreateInput Yes

Output

Type: User
Required: Yes
List: No

delete

Delete one User

// Delete one User
const User = await prisma.user.delete({
  where: {
    // ... filter to delete one User
  }
})

Input

Name Type Required
where UserWhereUniqueInput Yes

Output

Type: User
Required: No
List: No

update

Update one User

// Update one User
const user = await prisma.user.update({
  where: {
    // ... provide filter here
  },
  data: {
    // ... provide data here
  }
})

Input

Name Type Required
data UserUpdateInput | UserUncheckedUpdateInput Yes
where UserWhereUniqueInput Yes

Output

Type: User
Required: No
List: No

deleteMany

Delete zero or more User

// Delete a few User
const { count } = await prisma.user.deleteMany({
  where: {
    // ... provide filter here
  }
})

Input

Name Type Required
where UserWhereInput No
limit Int No

Output

Type: AffectedRowsOutput
Required: Yes
List: No

updateMany

Update zero or one User

const { count } = await prisma.user.updateMany({
  where: {
    // ... provide filter here
  },
  data: {
    // ... provide data here
  }
})

Input

Name Type Required
data UserUpdateManyMutationInput | UserUncheckedUpdateManyInput Yes
where UserWhereInput No
limit Int No

Output

Type: AffectedRowsOutput
Required: Yes
List: No

upsert

Create or update one User

// Update or create a User
const user = await prisma.user.upsert({
  create: {
    // ... data to create a User
  },
  update: {
    // ... in case it already exists, update
  },
  where: {
    // ... the filter for the User we want to update
  }
})

Input

Name Type Required
where UserWhereUniqueInput Yes
create UserCreateInput | UserUncheckedCreateInput Yes
update UserUpdateInput | UserUncheckedUpdateInput Yes

Output

Type: User
Required: Yes
List: No

Department

Description: Groups positions under a business unit. Parent container of Position.

  • title
  • userId

  • title
  • userId

Fields

Name Type Attributes Required Comment
id Int
  • @id
  • @default(autoincrement())
 Yes -
title String
  • -
Yes -
userId Int
  • -
Yes -
createdAt DateTime
  • @default(now())
 Yes -
updatedAt DateTime
  • @updatedAt
 Yes -
user User
  • -
Yes -
positions Position[]
  • -
Yes -

findUnique

    // ... provide filter here

Name Type Required
where DepartmentWhereUniqueInput Yes

distinct DepartmentScalarFieldEnum | DepartmentScalarFieldEnum[] No

findMany

// Get first 10 Department

Name Type Required
where DepartmentWhereInput No
orderBy DepartmentOrderByWithRelationInput[] | DepartmentOrderByWithRelationInput No
cursor DepartmentWhereUniqueInput No

skip Int No

Position

Description: Defines the job requirements baseline used by the AI to evaluate candidates.

Fields

Name Type Attributes Required Comment
id Int
  • @id
  • @default(autoincrement())
 Yes -
role String
  • -
Yes The official title of the job opening.
yearsOfExperience Int
  • -
Yes -
description String
  • -
Yes -
technicalSkills Json
  • -
Yes Required hard skills — array of strings stored as JSON.
optionalTechnicalSkills Json
  • -
Yes Nice-to-have skills — array of strings stored as JSON.
softSkills Json
  • -
Yes Interpersonal skills — array of strings stored as JSON.
languages Json
  • -
Yes Required languages — array of strings stored as JSON.
educationLevel EducationLevel
  • -
Yes Minimum education level required.
educationArea String
  • -
Yes Required field of study (e.g. "Computer Science").
positionPdfUrl String?
  • -
No Cloudinary URL of the uploaded job description PDF used for AI autocompletion.
departmentId Int
  • -
Yes -
userId Int
  • -
Yes -
createdAt DateTime
  • @default(now())
 Yes -
updatedAt DateTime
  • @updatedAt
 Yes -
department Department
  • -
Yes -
user User
  • -
Yes -
vacancies Vacancy[]
  • -
Yes -

Candidate

Description: Candidate parsed from a CV PDF uploaded directly to a Vacancy.
Name Value
@@unique
  • userId
  • hash
@@index
  • userId
  • hash

Fields

Name Type Attributes Required Comment
id Int
  • @id
  • @default(autoincrement())
 Yes -
fullName String
  • -
Yes -
email String
  • -
Yes -
description String
  • -
Yes -
educationLevel EducationLevel
  • -
Yes -
educationArea String
  • -
Yes -
fileUrl String?
  • -
No Cloudinary URL of the original CV PDF.
languages Json
  • -
Yes Spoken languages extracted from the CV — array of strings stored as JSON.
optionalTechnicalSkills Json
  • -
Yes -
softSkills Json
  • -
Yes -
technicalSkills Json
  • -
Yes -
role String
  • -
Yes -
yearsOfExperience Int
  • -
Yes -
hash String
  • -
Yes SHA-256 hash of parsed CV text. Prevents duplicate OpenAI API calls per user.
rawApiPayload Json
  • -
Yes Raw JSON payload returned by the AI for auditing.
status CandidateStatus
  • @default(DISPONIBLE)
 Yes -
userId Int
  • -
Yes -
vacancyId Int
  • -
Yes The vacancy of the original upload. A candidate reused for other vacancies (same hash, same user) is linked to those via Application — this field does not represent every vacancy the candidate applies to.
createdAt DateTime
  • @default(now())
 Yes -
updatedAt DateTime
  • @updatedAt
 Yes -
applications Application[]
  • -
Yes -
matchResults MatchResult[]
  • -
Yes -
user User
  • -
Yes -
vacancy Vacancy
  • -
Yes -

  where: {
    // ... provide filter here
  }
})

Description: AI evaluation score connecting a Candidate to a Vacancy.
Name Value
@@unique
  • candidateId
  • vacancyId
@@index
  • candidateId
  • vacancyId

Fields

Name Type Attributes Required Comment
id Int
  • @id
  • @default(autoincrement())
 Yes -

  • -
Yes -

  • -
Yes -
experienceScore Int
  • -
Yes -
hardSkillsScore Int
  • -
Yes -
languagesScore Int
  • -
Yes -
roleScore Int
  • -
Yes -
softSkillsScore Int
  • -
Yes -
normalizedCandidate Json
  • -
Yes Cached snapshot of candidate data at evaluation time for auditability.
redFlags String?
  • -
No -
summary String
  • -
Yes -
candidateId Int
  • -
Yes -
vacancyId Int
  • -
Yes -

Yes -

deleteMany

Delete zero or more MatchResult

// Delete a few MatchResult
const { count } = await prisma.matchResult.deleteMany({
  where: {
    // ... provide filter here
  }
})

Input

Name Type Required
where MatchResultWhereInput No
limit Int No

Output

Type: AffectedRowsOutput
Required: Yes
List: No

updateMany

Update zero or one MatchResult

const { count } = await prisma.matchResult.updateMany({
  where: {
    // ... provide filter here
  },
  data: {
    // ... provide data here
  }
})

Input

Name Type Required
data MatchResultUpdateManyMutationInput | MatchResultUncheckedUpdateManyInput Yes
where MatchResultWhereInput No
limit Int No

Output

Type: AffectedRowsOutput
Required: Yes
List: No

upsert

Create or update one MatchResult

// Update or create a MatchResult
const matchResult = await prisma.matchResult.upsert({
  create: {
    // ... data to create a MatchResult
  },
  update: {
    // ... in case it already exists, update
  },
  where: {
    // ... the filter for the MatchResult we want to update
  }
})

Input

Name Type Required
where MatchResultWhereUniqueInput Yes
create MatchResultCreateInput | MatchResultUncheckedCreateInput Yes
update MatchResultUpdateInput | MatchResultUncheckedUpdateInput Yes

Output

Type: MatchResult
Required: Yes
List: No
